name: Multi-AHA Benchmark
description: Multi-AHA is a benchmark for accessibility-related hallucinations in multimodal models. It contains 2,000 UI screenshots (1,000 mobile and 1,000 web) from the RICO and Silatus datasets, six standardized prompts (P1–P6) for alt-text generation and accessibility reasoning, and evaluation scripts.
license: Research-only license (non-commercial; please refer to the original RICO and Silatus datasets for their terms)

resources.name: ui_manifest_2k.csv
resources.description: CSV manifest listing 2,000 UI screenshots, including an image ID, the platform (mobile/web), a placeholder UI type, and the relative path to the screenshot file.

fields.name: platform
fields.description: Platform of the UI (mobile or web).

fields.name: image_path
fields.description: Relative path to the screenshot image file.

resources.name: images
resources.description: Directory containing the 2,000 UI screenshot PNG/JPG files in subfolders `mobile/` and `web/`.

resources.name: prompts_config
resources.description: Configuration file containing definitions of the six prompts (P1–P6), model IDs, and judge models.

resources.name: evaluation_scripts
resources.description: Python scripts for running model inference (`run_local_model_inference.py`), judge scoring (`run_judge_inference-vision.py`), metric computation (`compute_metrics.py`), and judge agreement analysis (`compute_judge_agreement.py`).
